calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-20-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Richard Brody, Esq. for Petitioner: Melvin Brackendorf, as Guardian at litem for: Wiley Dallas DeWeese.
Order waiving appearance of the Petitioner and Claimant is in file.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $9,112.57
Costs $549.96
A net balance of $27,337.47 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, Investment Services, 5500 Preston Road, Suite B, Dallas, TX. 75205, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
